import React from "react"; function Home() { const displayname = localStorage.getItem("name") || "User"; return ( <>

Welcome, {displayname} to My Portfolio

Hello, I'm Prathmesh Nalawade

MERN Stack Developer (Fresher) | BCS Graduate

I am a Bachelor of Computer Science (BCS) graduate and a certified Full Stack Web Developer (MERN Stack), passionate about building responsive, scalable, and user-friendly web applications. I have hands-on experience with React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, along with strong knowledge of Git and GitHub. I enjoy working across both frontend and backend development, creating REST APIs, and managing databases to deliver complete web solutions. I also work with Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, build modern and efficient applications. Currently improving Docker, deployment, and system design

); } export default Home;
